title: Capability Semantic Enrichment
description: The 17-field semantic understanding layer produced by semantic_analyzer for each capability. Persisted at output/ops_platform/semantic/{capability_id}.json and merged onto capability dicts at registry read time. Generated by an LLM when available, by deterministic heuristics otherwise.

source.description: How this enrichment was produced. Heuristic fallback is used when the LLM is unavailable or returned an unparseable response.

operational_intent.description: One sentence: what business job this capability does, in plain language.

business_domains.description: Cross-functional business areas this capability supports (Sales, Operations, Engineering, Finance, etc.).

workflow_patterns.description: Named patterns this capability participates in: 'inbound triage', 'document summarization', 'data extraction', etc.

automation_potential.description: How much of the underlying business task this capability can take over.

duplicate_candidates.description: Capability IDs that may duplicate this one. Surface to admins for consolidation.

recommended_followup_workflows.description: Capability IDs commonly run AFTER this one.

recommended_preceding_workflows.description: Capability IDs commonly run BEFORE this one.

execution_dependencies.description: MCP server / agent / tool ids this capability needs to execute correctly.

organizational_value_summary.description: Two-sentence summary of why this matters to the org.

estimated_roi.description: Plain-language ROI: 'Saves ~35 min per use; high volume team-wide.'

semantic_tags.description: Stable normalized tags for graph + search. Lowercase, hyphen-or-underscore.
